Stress Free Moving Experience

Moving, made simple.

Relocations across Ontario, from Kingston to Toronto, Ottawa, and beyond. Upfront pricing, careful hands, zero stress.

Get My Free QuoteCall (613) 770-1638
  • Licensed and Insured
  • 2+ Years Experience
  • 80+ Moves Completed
  • Upfront Pricing

Our Process

  1. 01

    Consult

    Tell us what you're moving, where from, and where to. Five minutes on the phone or the form below is all it takes.

  2. 02

    Plan

    We map the route, the crew size, and the equipment before moving day. No guesswork, no surprises at the door.

  3. 03

    Quote

    One fixed price, locked in writing before we touch a box. Priced by the space you use, not the weight.

  4. 04

    Schedule

    Pick the date and we handle the rest. You'll know exactly when we arrive and when you're done.

Get a free quote in under 2 minutes.

Tell us where you're moving from and to, and we'll put together an upfront price. No surprises, no pressure.

Prefer to talk? (613) 770-1638, Mon to Sat, 8am to 7pm EST.

No commitment required. We'll respond within a few hours.

Why Bitlane

Priced by volume, not weight.

You pay for the space your belongings take up, nothing more. No hidden surcharges for heavy furniture, no bait-and-switch on moving day.

Upfront quotes, no surprises.

Every quote is fixed before we touch a single box. You know the exact cost from the start, so you can plan with confidence.

A stress-free experience.

We handle the heavy lifting, literally. Licensed, insured, and trained to treat your home and belongings with the care they deserve.

What We Move

Residential Moves

Studio apartments to large family homes, furniture, appliances, fragile items.

Long-Distance Moves

Kingston to Toronto, Ottawa, Montreal, and beyond. Fixed pricing across the full route.

Office Relocations

Business moves on your timeline, coordinated to minimize downtime.

Packing Services

Full or partial packing with professional-grade materials.

Furniture Assembly

Disassemble at pickup, reassemble at delivery. No tools required from you.

Storage Solutions

Short and long-term secure storage options available.

Same-Day Moves

Last-minute booking, availability for urgent relocations.

Local Kingston Moves

Quick, efficient moves within the Kingston area, often completed in a day.

Service Area

  • Kingston, ON.Home base.
  • Toronto, ON.About 3 hours.
  • Ottawa, ON.About 2 hours.
  • Montréal, QC.About 3 hours.
